components.name: DataSourceProvider
components.description: Root provider component that wraps the application with QueryClientProvider and DataManagerProvider, managing query normalization subscriptions lifecycle.

props.name: dataManager
props.description: The ClientDataManager instance that manages query client, normalization and data invalidation.

props.name: children
props.description: Child components to render within the provider.

components.name: ClientDataManager
components.description: Class implementing DataManager interface. Manages QueryClient, data normalization, optimistic updates, and cache invalidation for data sources.

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Configuration extending QueryClientConfig with optional normalizerConfig.

methods.name: optimisticUpdate
methods.signature: (mutationData: Data, queryKey?: QueryKey, queryData?: Data) => void
methods.description: Performs optimistic update on queries affected by mutation data.

methods.name: invalidateData
methods.description: Invalidates queries affected by the given data.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates queries based on normalization, applying optimistic updates and/or invalidation per query meta configuration.

methods.name: invalidateTag
methods.description: Invalidates all queries matching the given tag.

methods.name: invalidateTags
methods.description: Invalidates all queries matching all given tags.

methods.name: invalidateSource
methods.signature: <TDataSource extends AnyDataSource>(dataSource: TDataSource, invalidateOptions?: InvalidateOptions) => Promise<void>
methods.description: Invalidates all queries for a given data source.

methods.name: resetSource
methods.description: Resets all queries for a given data source.

methods.name: invalidateParams
methods.signature: <TDataSource extends AnyDataSource>(dataSource: TDataSource, params: DataSourceParams<TDataSource>, invalidateOptions?: InvalidateOptions) => Promise<void>
methods.description: Invalidates queries for a data source with specific parameters.

methods.name: resetParams
methods.signature: <TDataSource extends AnyDataSource>(dataSource: TDataSource, params: DataSourceParams<TDataSource>) => Promise<void>
methods.description: Resets queries for a data source with specific parameters.

methods.name: invalidateSourceTags
methods.signature: <TDataSource extends AnyDataSource>(dataSource: TDataSource, params: DataSourceParams<TDataSource>, invalidateOptions?: InvalidateOptions) => Promise<void>
methods.description: Invalidates queries matching a data source's tags for given parameters.

components.name: makePlainQueryDataSource
components.description: Factory function that creates a plain (non-paginated) query data source configuration with type 'plain'.
components.signature: <TParams, TRequest, TResponse, TData, TError>(config: Omit<PlainQueryDataSource<TParams, TRequest, TResponse, TData, TError>, 'type'>) => PlainQueryDataSource<TParams, TRequest, TResponse, TData, TError>

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Data source configuration with name, fetch, optional transformParams, transformResponse, tags, and options.

components.name: makeInfiniteQueryDataSource
components.description: Factory function that creates an infinite (paginated) query data source configuration with type 'infinite'. Requires next page param resolver and optional prev page param resolver.
components.signature: <TParams, TRequest, TResponse, TData, TError>(config: Omit<InfiniteQueryDataSource<TParams, TRequest, TResponse, TData, TError>, 'type'>) => InfiniteQueryDataSource<TParams, TRequest, TResponse, TData, TError>

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Data source configuration with name, fetch, next, optional prev, transformParams, transformResponse, tags, and options.

components.name: composePlainQueryOptions
components.description: Composes TanStack Query options from a plain data source, params, and context. Produces queryKey, queryFn, select, and meta for useQuery.
components.signature: <TDataSource extends AnyPlainQueryDataSource>(context: DataSourceContext<TDataSource>, dataSource: TDataSource, params: DataSourceParams<TDataSource>, options?: Partial<DataSourceOptions<TDataSource>>) => QueryObserverExtendedOptions<...>

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Query data source context containing the query client.

parameters.name: dataSource
parameters.description: The plain query data source.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Parameters for the query. Pass idle symbol to skip the query.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Additional query options to merge.

components.name: composeInfiniteQueryOptions
components.description: Composes TanStack Query infinite query options from an infinite data source, params, and context. Produces queryKey, queryFn, select, getNextPageParam, getPreviousPageParam, and meta.
components.signature: <TDataSource extends AnyInfiniteQueryDataSource>(context: DataSourceContext<TDataSource>, dataSource: TDataSource, params: DataSourceParams<TDataSource>, options?: Partial<DataSourceOptions<TDataSource>>) => InfiniteQueryObserverExtendedOptions<...>

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Query data source context containing the query client.

parameters.name: dataSource
parameters.description: The infinite query data source.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Parameters for the query. Pass idle symbol to skip the query.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Additional query options to merge.

components.return_type: InfiniteQueryObserverExtendedOptions<DataSourceResponse<TDataSource>, DataSourceError<TDataSource>, InfiniteData<DataSourceData<TDataSource>, AnyPageParam>, DataSourceResponse<TDataSource>, DataSourceKey, AnyPageParam>

components.name: normalizeStatus
components.description: Converts TanStack Query status and fetchStatus into a unified DataLoaderStatus. Maps pending+fetching to 'loading', pending+idle to 'success', and passes through 'success' and 'error'.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: TanStack Query status: 'pending' | 'success' | 'error'.

parameters.name: fetchStatus
parameters.description: TanStack Query fetch status: 'fetching' | 'paused' | 'idle'.

components.name: getProgressiveRefetch
components.description: Creates a progressive refetch interval function with exponential backoff. Interval = min(minInterval * multiplier^count, maxInterval).
components.signature: <TQueryFnData, TError, TData, TQueryKey extends QueryKey>(options: ProgressiveRefetchOptions) => RefetchIntervalFunction<TQueryFnData, TError, TData, TQueryKey>

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Options object with minInterval (number), maxInterval (number), and optional multiplier (number, defaults to 2).

components.name: idle
components.description: Unique symbol used as a sentinel value for data source params to indicate the query should be skipped (not fetched). Preferred over the deprecated enabled option.

components.name: composeKey
components.description: Composes a string cache key from a data source and its params. Returns 'name:idle' for idle params, or 'name(hashedParams)' otherwise.
components.signature: <TDataSource extends AnyDataSource>(dataSource: TDataSource, params: DataSourceParams<TDataSource>) => string

parameters.name: dataSource
parameters.description: The data source instance.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Query parameters or idle symbol.

components.name: composeFullKey
components.description: Composes a full query key array from a data source and params, including the data source name, tags, and the composed key string.
components.signature: <TDataSource extends AnyDataSource>(dataSource: TDataSource, params: DataSourceParams<TDataSource>) => ReadonlyArray<string>

parameters.name: dataSource
parameters.description: The data source instance.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Query parameters or idle symbol.

components.name: getError
components.description: Returns the first non-null error from an array of states, or null if none found.

parameters.name: states
parameters.description: Array of state objects with error property.

components.name: getStatus
components.description: Merges an array of DataLoaderStatus values into a single status. Returns 'error' if any is error, 'loading' if any is loading, 'success' otherwise.

parameters.name: states
parameters.description: Array of state objects with status property.

components.name: hasTag
components.description: Checks if a data source key array contains a given tag. Skips the first element (data source name) and last element (full key) for consistency.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The data source query key array.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: The tag string to search for.

components.name: mergeStatuses
components.description: Merges an array of DataLoaderStatus values into a single status with priority: error > loading > success.

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Array of status values to merge.

components.name: skipContext
components.description: Wraps a fetch function to ignore the data source context and fetch context parameters. Used to adapt simple fetch functions for the data source fetch signature.
components.signature: <TFunc extends AnyFunction>(fetch: TFunc) => (_0: unknown, _1: unknown, ...args: Parameters<TFunc>) => ReturnType<TFunc>

parameters.name: fetch
parameters.description: The fetch function to wrap.

components.name: withCatch
components.description: Wraps a Promise-returning function with standardized error handling. Catches errors and processes them through a provided error handler.
components.signature: <TArgs extends unknown[], TFetchReturnType, TCatchReturnType>(fetchFn: (...args: TArgs) => Promise<TFetchReturnType>, onCatchFn: (reason: unknown) => TCatchReturnType) => (...args: TArgs) => Promise<TFetchReturnType | TCatchReturnType>

parameters.name: fetchFn
parameters.description: The original function that returns a Promise.

parameters.name: onCatchFn
parameters.description: Error handler function that processes caught errors.

components.name: withCancellation
components.description: Wraps a data source fetch function to support cancellation. If the fetch context has an AbortSignal and the return value is Cancellable, connects abort to cancel.

parameters.name: fetch
parameters.description: The data source fetch function to wrap with cancellation support.

components.name: isCancellable
components.description: Type guard that checks if a value implements the Cancellable interface (has a cancel method).

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to check.

components.name: isAbortable
components.description: Type guard that checks if a value has an AbortSignal signal property.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value to check.

hooks.name: useQueryData
hooks.description: Primary hook for fetching data from a data source. Supports both plain and infinite query data sources, dispatching to the appropriate implementation based on dataSource.type.
hooks.signature: <TDataSource extends AnyQueryDataSource>(dataSource: TDataSource, params: DataSourceParams<TDataSource>, options?: Partial<DataSourceOptions<TDataSource>>) => DataSourceState<TDataSource>

parameters.name: dataSource
parameters.description: A plain or infinite query data source created via makePlainQueryDataSource or makeInfiniteQueryDataSource.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Parameters for the query. Pass idle to skip the query.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Additional query options to override data source defaults.

hooks.name: useQueryContext
hooks.description: Returns the QueryDataSourceContext containing the QueryClient instance from the nearest QueryClientProvider.

hooks.name: useQueryResponses
hooks.description: Combines multiple query response states into a single aggregated state with merged status, first error, refetch-all, and refetch-errored callbacks.
hooks.signature: <TError>(responses: {status: DataLoaderStatus; error: TError | null; refetch: Function}[]) => {status: DataLoaderStatus; error: NonNullable<TError> | null; refetch: () => void; refetchErrored: () => void}

parameters.name: responses
parameters.type: {status: DataLoaderStatus; error: TError | null; refetch: Function}[]
parameters.description: Array of query response state objects to combine.

hooks.return_type: {status: DataLoaderStatus; error: NonNullable<TError> | null; refetch: () => void; refetchErrored: () => void}

hooks.name: useRefetchAll
hooks.description: Returns a memoized callback that triggers refetch on all provided query states.

parameters.name: states
parameters.description: Array of state objects with refetch functions.

hooks.name: useRefetchErrored
hooks.description: Returns a memoized callback that triggers refetch only on states that have a non-null error.

parameters.name: states
parameters.description: Array of state objects with error and refetch properties.

hooks.name: useRefetchInterval
hooks.description: Manages refetch interval with fetch count tracking. Wraps queryFn to count invocations and passes count to the refetchInterval function for progressive/adaptive polling.
hooks.signature: <TQueryFnData, TError, TQueryData, TQueryKey extends QueryKey, TPageParam>(refetchInterval?: RefetchInterval<TQueryFnData, TError, TQueryData, TQueryKey>, queryFn?: QueryFunction<TQueryFnData, TQueryKey, TPageParam> | SkipToken) => UseRefetchIntervalResult<TQueryFnData, TError, TQueryData, TQueryKey, TPageParam>

parameters.name: refetchInterval
parameters.description: Refetch interval value or function that receives (query, count) and returns interval or false.

parameters.name: queryFn
parameters.description: Query function to wrap with fetch counting.
